name: Broccoli-Cheddar Soup
recipeInstructions:
10-1/2 ounces each
Reduced-fat, shredded and divided
1. Bring 3 quarts of water to a boil in a Dutch oven.
2. Add broccoli and cook for 7 minutes or until tender. Drain and set aside.
3. Coat a large saucepan with cooking spray.
4. Add margarine and melt over medium heat.
5. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes or until tender.
6. Transfer the mixture to a food processor bowl and process until smooth, scraping sides occasionally.
7. Set aside.
8. In a large saucepan, combine yogurt and flour. Stir with a wire whisk.
9. Gradually add chicken broth and remaining ingredients; stir well.
10. Cook over medium heat for 20 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring constantly.
11. Add the broccoli mixture and stir well.
12. Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted.
13. Ladle soup into bowls and top with remaining cheese.
14. Yields 6 cups.
Per Serving: Protein: 12/Fat: 5.8/Carbohydrate: 15.9/Cholesterol 16/Iron: 1.6/Sodium: 411/Calcium 293
